name: MemPoison: Uncovering Persistent Memory Threats and Structural Blind Spots in LLM Agents

description: arXiv:2607.14651v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Persistent external memory enhances agent continuity but introduces persistent security vulnerabilities: adversarial content can be injected via standard interaction channels, retained across turns, and later distort downstream behavior. To address this challenge, we propose MemPoison, a comprehensive benchmark and analysis framework featuring 1...
author: Jifeng Gao, Kang Xia, Yi Zhang, Xiaobin Hong, Mingkai Lin, Xingshen Wei, Wenzhong Li, Sanglu Lu
